transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I want an appointment for a sports injury. I play cricket and I hurt my shoulder during practice last weekend.
AGENT: Sorry to hear that! Our orthopaedic team handles sports injuries. May I have your name and number?
CALLER: Mayank Shukla. 9833445566.
AGENT: Dr. Pramod Joshi specialises in sports-related orthopaedic injuries. He has a slot this Friday at 11 AM. Sound good?
CALLER: Friday works. Should I get any scans done beforehand?
AGENT: It's usually better to let Dr. Joshi examine you first and then order specific scans if needed. Bring any X-rays or reports you may have already done though.
CALLER: I had an X-ray done locally. I'll bring it.
AGENT: Perfect. Mayank Shukla, Friday 11 AM with Dr. Joshi. Get well soon and back on the pitch quickly!
CALLER: Haha, hope so! Thanks.
